response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, deep exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks at Naver, and proven leadership in building production systems — but lacks explicit evidence of 8+ years focused on GenAI/ML systems, vector databases, or RAG architectures, and his education lacks an advanced degree, which may limit credibility for a staff-level GenAI role.
strengths: Direct experience with AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) at Naver
Proven ability to lead technical projects across cloud (AWS), data pipelines, and multi-language environments
Strong track record of open-source contributions and technical mentoring through workshops and tools
concerns: No clear documentation of 8+ years specifically in GenAI or production ML systems
Missing explicit experience with vector databases or RAG architectures in resume
No advanced degree (Master’s/PhD), which is a preferred qualification for staff-level GenAI roles
